title: Classic German Butterkuchen
description: A traditional German butter cake that's easy to make and perfect for breakfast or brunch. The combination of melted butter and sugar creates a rich, caramel-like flavor.
instructions: Butter a 23cm (9-inch) springform pan and dust it with sugar.
Beat the softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs one at a time.
Mix in the flour, salt, and vanilla.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Let the cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
